executives.name: David Cates
executives.background: Mr. Cates is the President and CEO of Denison and also serves as a Director. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) and holds a Master of Accounting and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Waterloo. He has been with Denison since 2008, previously serving as Vice President Finance, Tax and CFO.

executives.name: Elizabeth Freele
executives.background: Ms. Freele is the Chief Sustainability Officer at Denison. She is a sustainability professional with over 15 years of experience in the extractive sector, specializing in ESG strategy, risk management, and stakeholder engagement.

executives.name: Kevin Himbeault
executives.background: Mr. Himbeault is the Vice President, Operations and Regulatory Affairs. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on environmental management and regulatory compliance in the uranium sector.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Operations and Regulatory Affairs

executives.name: Geoff Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is the Vice President, Corporate Development & Commercial. He is a lawyer by training and has extensive experience in corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and commercial negotiations within the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Ron Hochstein
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hochstein is the Chair of the Board. He is also the President and CEO of Lundin Gold Inc. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry and holds a B.Sc. in Metallurgical Engineering from the University of Alberta.

board_of_directors.name: David Cates
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cates is the President and CEO of Denison. He has been a director since 2015.

board_of_directors.name: Brian Edgar
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Edgar is a director and has served as the Chairman of Silver Bull Resources Inc. He has over 30 years of experience in the junior resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Junlin Huang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Huang is a director and is the nominee of Beijing Sino-Can Uranium Resources Co. Ltd. He has extensive experience in the uranium industry in China.

board_of_directors.name: Patricia Volker
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Volker is a director and a CPA, CA. She has extensive experience in financial reporting and corporate governance, having served in senior roles at the Ontario Securities Commission.
